mergewith.fragment:
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingPrior" id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARPrior.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.OneOnX"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARScaler.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingPrior" id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARPriorSmart.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.OneOnX"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/>

<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingPrior" id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARPrior.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.OneOnX"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARScaler.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingPrior" id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARPriorSmart.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.OneOnX"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SSSCALARBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment: <distribution spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior" id='$(thisparam)SSSCALARPrior.t:$(n)' x='@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="10.0"/> </distribution> <operator id="$(thisparam)SSSCALAROperator.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.util.operators.ChangeTimeOperator" scaleFactor="0.75" windowSize="1" weight="3" changeTimes="@$(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)) and inposterior(SSSCALARBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)SSSCALAR.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.subtemplate:
<typeTraitSet id="typeTraitSet.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.util.InitializedTraitSet" traitname="type"> <taxa spec="beast.base.evolution.alignment.TaxonSet" alignment="@$(n)"/> </typeTraitSet>
<parameterization id="SSSCALARBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SSSCALARParameterization"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <typeSet idref="typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <becomeUninfectiousRate id="becomeUninfectiousRateSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="becomeUninfectiousRateSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0"/> </becomeUninfectiousRate> <migrationRate id="migrationRateSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="migrationRateSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> </migrationRate> <samplingProportion id="samplingProportionSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="samplingProportionSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="0.1" lower="0.0" upper="1.0"/> </samplingProportion> <removalProb id="removalProbSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="removalProbSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" upper="1.0" estimate="false"/> </removalProb>
<rhoSampling id="rhoSamplingProbSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TimedParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </rhoSampling>
<!-- Super Spreader parameters --> <CommonChangeTime id="CommonChangeTimeSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TimeOnlySkylineParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </CommonChangeTime> <ReAverage id="ReAverageSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineScalarCommonTimeParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="ReAverageSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0"/> <commonSkyline idref="CommonChangeTimeSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/> </ReAverage> <SSFrac id="SSFracSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineScalarCommonTimeParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="SSFracSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0"/> <commonSkyline idref="CommonChangeTimeSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/> </SSFrac> <ReMultiplier id="ReMultiplierSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineScalarCommonTimeParameter" typeSet="@typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"> <processLength idref="originBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="ReMultiplierSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter' value="1.0" lower="0.0"/> <commonSkyline idref="CommonChangeTimeSPSSSCALAR.t:$(n)"/> </ReMultiplier>
</parameterization>
<typeSet id="typeSetSSBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TypeSet" typeTraitSet="@typeTraitSet.t:$(n)" value="NS,SS" unknownTypeIdentifier="NOT_SET"> </typeSet>
<param id="becomeUninfectiousRateChangeTimesSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="migrationRateChangeTimesSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="samplingProportionChangeTimesSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="removalProbChangeTimesSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/>
<param id="CommonChangeTimeChangeTimesSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="1.0" lower="0.0" estimate="false"/>
<param id="rhoSamplingProbSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="0.0" estimate="false"/> <param id="rhoSamplingProbTimesSSSCALAR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.parameter.RealParameter" value="0.0" estimate="false"/>
